name: California Loan & Jewelry
description_short: Capital City Loan & Jewelry is a full-service pawnbroker in Sacramento with nine locations offering pawn loans and purchases of jewelry, electronics, and collectibles.
description_long:
Capital City Loan & Jewelry operates as a pawn shop with nine convenient locations throughout Sacramento, California. The company provides pawn loans and merchandise purchases as their primary services, positioning themselves as a quick cash solution for customers with valuable items. Their main location is at 5656 Auburn Blvd, Sacramento, CA 95841, with additional branches on Fruitridge Rd, Del Paso Blvd, and Folsom Blvd.

The company accepts a wide range of collateral and merchandise, including electronics, jewelry, gold and silver, watches, Apple products, musical instruments, antiques, and phonograph records. They offer both sides of the pawn transaction: customers can pledge items for loans or sell items outright. Capital City Loan & Jewelry emphasizes competitive offers and fair pricing on their merchandise and loan terms.

Capital City Loan & Jewelry distinguishes itself through multi-location convenience across Sacramento, extended hours (most locations open 9 AM–6 PM weekdays, with Sunday hours), and an emphasis on customer service and competitive dealing. The company markets itself as "the friendliest pawn shop in town" and highlights their experience and knowledge as a licensed pawnbroker.

As a pawn shop, Capital City Loan & Jewelry serves customers needing immediate cash against personal valuables. The business model is straightforward: pledge items for short-term loans or sell items for cash. However, customers should understand that pawn loans typically carry higher effective interest rates than personal loans, and failure to repay results in loss of the pledged item. This is a legitimate but high-cost borrowing option suitable only when other alternatives are unavailable.
pros: Nine convenient Sacramento-area locations reduce travel burden for customers
Extended hours (9 AM–6 PM most locations, including Sunday service) provide accessibility
Accepts diverse collateral types beyond jewelry—electronics, instruments, records, and antiques
Immediate cash disbursement for loans, addressing urgent financial needs
Fair pricing and competitive offers explicitly emphasized on their website
No credit check required; only collateral value matters for loan eligibility
Knowledgeable pawnbroker staff with experience evaluating diverse merchandise types
cons: Pawn loans carry high effective interest rates compared to traditional personal loans
Limited transparency on specific loan terms, rates, and repayment periods on their website
Default on pawn loans results in permanent loss of pledged item with no recourse
Most locations have reduced weekend hours (10 AM start) and one location closes Sundays entirely
No information provided about loan amount limits or maximum loan-to-value ratios
best_for: Customers needing cash within hours who own valuable items and cannot qualify for traditional loans
People with broken or unwanted jewelry, electronics, or collectibles who want immediate cash
Individuals seeking to temporarily pledge items for short-term loans with clear repayment intent
Buyers seeking discounted merchandise on pre-owned jewelry, instruments, and collectibles
diagnosis: Capital City Loan & Jewelry is best for customers with valuable items who need emergency cash and cannot access traditional lending. The main caveat: pawn loans are expensive short-term debt that results in permanent loss of your item if unpaid—use only as a last resort when other borrowing options are unavailable.
services: Pawn loans against personal valuables and collectibles
Purchase and sale of used jewelry, gold, and silver items
Electronics and Apple product evaluation and purchase
Watch and timepiece evaluation and loans
In-store merchandise shopping for pre-owned items
Customer service consultation on loan and sale terms
